overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a rural countryside at golden hour. The character approaches and passes a wooden windmill, continues past a thatched shelter, and moves into an open field.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with scattered flowering bushes

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through tall grass toward a distant wooden windmill

entered.detail: tall wooden windmill with four blades situated on a grassy hill
scattered bushes with white blossoms dotting the field
dense line of trees forming the horizon boundary

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through an open field of tall grass during golden hour, approaching a wooden windmill visible in the distance. White flowering bushes dot the landscape to the right while a forest line marks the horizon ahead.

events.description: approaching the base of the wooden windmill

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking around the base of the windmill on a grassy slope, navigating the earthen mound

entered.detail: earthen mound at the base of the windmill with exposed soil
wooden structure with straw roof visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: Geralt reaches the base of the windmill, walking alongside its wooden structure and the earthen mound at its foundation. A thatched shelter becomes visible ahead in the distance as the windmill passes by on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: path leading to thatched wooden shelter

events.description: entering the shadow cast by the thatched shelter

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along a worn path toward the thatched shelter, passing wooden barrels and fencing

entered.detail: stacked wooden barrels with metal bands under the shelter
rough wooden fence posts and rails lining the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches the thatched wooden shelter along a dirt path, passing wooden barrels and fencing. The lighting shifts as he enters the shadow of the structure's overhanging roof.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dirt field with distant forest

events.description: exiting the shelter area into open dirt field

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along a dirt path through an open field with sparse vegetation

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges from the shelter into an open dirt field, continuing along the path. The windmill and shelter are now behind him as he moves toward the distant tree line under the golden hour sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rural countryside that transitions from an open field to a cluster of rustic structures before returning to the open landscape. It begins with Geralt walking through tall grass and white flowering bushes during the golden hour, moving steadily toward a distant wooden windmill. As he reaches the base of the windmill, the camera tracks alongside the wooden structure and its earthen mound before the view opens up to reveal a thatched shelter ahead. The scene then shifts as he follows a dirt path past wooden barrels and fencing, momentarily entering the deep shadow of the shelter's overhanging roof. Finally, the camera emerges from the shade back into the golden light, leaving the buildings behind as he continues across a dirt field toward the distant tree line.
